# Usage Example:

**Query with Entity and Component Library:**
> Use blazor-list-pattern-generator skill to generate a complete list page structure with data table, search, sort, filter UI placeholders, and Playwright UI tests for the Request entity.
**带实体和组件库的提问：**
> 使用 blazor-list-pattern-generator skill，为 Request 实体生成完整的列表页面结构，包含数据表格、搜索、排序、过滤 UI 占位符和 Playwright UI 测试。
